name: {{NAME}}
objective: ONE sentence: what is being optimized and why (humans read this)
notes: primary_axis_range: optional [lo, hi] to anchor the dashboard's primary-metric y-axis to MEANINGFUL physical bounds (e.g. [0, 1024] for bytes/record where top = no compression, or [0, 1] for a pass rate) instead of autoscaling to the data. direction: maximize|minimize. NOISY metric (latency, LLM-judge)? Set promote_eps_rel and reverify_rel_tol >= 2x your measured noise band, or reverify_champion='gate-only'. EXPENSIVE evaluator? reverify_every=5 re-verifies the champion only every 5th eval (each eval otherwise costs champion+candidate). Pass-rate metric: promote_eps >= 1/N_cases. max_candidate_bytes is the embed-the-answer guard — keep it tight.
